commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=189da7d6b57104b9825d0945d9511c693c7c0e15)
commands.review_summary:
Adds a built-in CodeSandbox delegated-run provider with config, docs, registration, tests, and a live smoke script.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows provider=codesandbox has no --class/--type guard while adjacent delegated providers reject those flags. Real CodeSandbox behavior is not reproduced because the PR only reports an environment-blocked live smoke without credentials.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor action is needed for real CodeSandbox proof, and maintainers need to review the new provider boundary after the flag-contract fix.

target.title: feat(codesandbox): add CodeSandbox provider
target.body:
Closes #334

## Summary

Adds a built-in `codesandbox` delegated-run provider backed by the CodeSandbox SDK. The provider can create and reuse Crabbox-owned SDK VM Sandboxes, sync the local checkout through the SDK file bridge, run commands, list/status/stop sandboxes, hibernate/resume, and expose provider-owned preview URLs through the ports/hosts SDK surfaces.

## Implementation Notes

- Adds `internal/providers/codesandbox` with env-only auth, local claim ownership checks, SDK bridge/client code, archive sync, lifecycle commands, pause/resume, ports, and cleanup.
- Registers the provider and updates config/flags, command docs, provider metadata, and the generated provider matrix.
- Runs the local Node SDK bridge from a trusted Crabbox cache directory with a minimal environment and prepares `@codesandbox/sdk` there with npm.
- Keeps the CodeSandbox API token out of persistent config and argv.
- Keeps forwarded command env values out of local argv and remote command text by staging them through a temporary remote env file before exec.

## Review Fixes

- Hardened trusted-only bridge config so repo config cannot replace the token-bearing bridge executable or SDK package.
- Made missing remote ownership tags fail closed before mutating or deleting remote sandboxes.
- Preserved empty command args and string command output from the SDK.
- Increased bridge timeout/capture limits for long or noisy delegated runs.
- Corrected SDK command/create option shapes and sync archive paths.
- Removed the misleading URL bridge capability while keeping ports URL output.
- Ensured read-only status/get paths do not resume hibernated sandboxes.
- Made live-smoke diagnostic failures exit nonzero except for explicit environment blockers.

## Verification

- `go test ./internal/providers/codesandbox`
- `go test ./internal/providers/codesandbox ./internal/providers/all ./internal/cli ./cmd/crabbox`
- `go test -race ./internal/providers/codesandbox ./internal/providers/all ./internal/cli`
- `go vet ./...`
- `node scripts/check-docs-links.mjs`
- `node scripts/check-command-docs.mjs`
- `node scripts/generate-provider-matrix.mjs --check`
- `go build -trimpath -o bin/crabbox ./cmd/crabbox`
- `./bin/crabbox providers --json`
- no-auth negative check for `crabbox doctor --provider codesandbox --json`
- `node scripts/live-codesandbox-smoke.test.js`
- `git diff --check`
- `~/.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

Live CodeSandbox smoke is credential-gated and currently classifies cleanly as `environment_blocked reason=missing_CRABBOX_CODESANDBOX_API_KEY_or_CSB_API_KEY` when no CodeSandbox API key is present.
target.author: coygeek
